ddls:
CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_category" TEXT /* Category of the holiday (e.g., national, religious, cultural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag image */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language(s) spoken in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the city's main image */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city's coordinates */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city's coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday destination */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the holiday */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday destination */,
  "destination_type" TEXT /* Type of destination (e.g., city, landmark, event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_destinations_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_destinations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel guide */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the holiday destination */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the travel guide */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the travel guide */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to an external travel guide or itinerary */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the travel guide */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the travel guide was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_guides_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES holiday_destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content manager, user) */,
  "preferred_holiday" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's preferred holiday */,
  "preferred_country" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's preferred country */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, click, save) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES holiday_destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES holiday_destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "itineraries" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each itinerary */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the itinerary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the itinerary */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days the itinerary covers */,
  "activities" TEXT /* List of activities or events in the itinerary */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Estimated budget for the itinerary */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the itinerary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_itineraries_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES holiday_destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred holiday */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred city */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., holiday, city) */,
  "preference_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the preference (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations_tags" (
  "destination_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination tag */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the destination (e.g., historic, cultural, foodie) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_tags_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES holiday_destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations_photos" (
  "destination_photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination photo */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_photos_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES holiday_destinations ("destination_id")
)
